items.title: UPQODE Website Launch Blocked — Approval Needed
items.summary: Website team is blocked awaiting final approval on copy changes sent last week. Client demo scheduled for tomorrow morning requires immediate resolution.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve copy changes or flag remaining changes to unblock website production before tomorrow's demo.

items.title: LeadMaker SDR Proposal Follow-up
items.summary: LeadMaker Sales Team following up on full-time SDR proposal for inbound lead management sent after initial discussion on May 9th.
items.actionNeeded: Review SDR proposal and decide whether to schedule call to review candidates or pass on the opportunity.
